name: cosmicvault
description: CosmicVault — Plataforma de Exploración Espacial con IA

scripts.dev: concurrently -n BE,FE -c cyan,green "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.test: cd backend && npm test && cd ../frontend && npm test
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && echo '✅ Listo. Corre: npm run dev'
